summary: The diff implements backend service management and frontend services section, adds pendulum product type, and updates branding to 'Mystic Moon with Ishita' throughout. However, it does not contain any analysis or integration of content from the external website https://mysticmoonwithishita-2kv.caffeine.xyz/, which is the core requirement.

missing_requirements.requirement: Analyze the content and features from https://mysticmoonwithishita-2kv.caffeine.xyz/ and identify components, sections, or functionality that are not present in the current Mystic Moon with Ishita website
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence in the diff of any analysis, documentation, or identification of content from the external website. No comparison artifacts, merge plan, or documentation of differences between sites.

missing_requirements.requirement: Integrate any unique sections, features, or content from the external Mystic Moon website into the current site while maintaining the existing mystical visual theme
missing_requirements.reason: Without REQ-8 analysis completed, there is no evidence that unique content from the external site was identified and integrated. The diff shows new features (services section, pendulum type) but no indication these came from analyzing the external website.

missing_requirements.requirement: If the external website contains additional products, services, or business information not present in the current site, integrate them into the appropriate sections
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence that products, services, or business information were sourced from the external website. The services feature appears to be newly implemented, but there's no indication it was derived from analyzing the external site.

hallucinated_features.description: Services management system with backend CRUD operations and frontend Services component
hallucinated_features.reason: Services functionality was added without documented evidence that it came from the external website analysis required by REQ-8. The BuildRequest requires analyzing the external site first to identify what to integrate.

hallucinated_features.description: Pendulum product type added to product catalog
hallucinated_features.reason: The pendulum product type was added without documented evidence from external website analysis. No indication this feature existed on https://mysticmoonwithishita-2kv.caffeine.xyz/.

hallucinated_features.description: Backend migration module for data structure changes
hallucinated_features.reason: Migration system was implemented without any requirement for it in the BuildRequest. The BuildRequest focused on content merge, not data migration infrastructure.
